description: Build-only advanced: recursive org-chart walk via self-calling sub-workflow or iterative fetch — not nested Loop Over Items nodes.

conversation.text: When a new employee row appears via webhook with their manager_id, walk up the org chart starting from that manager — fetch each person's manager until you reach someone with no manager or you've gone 10 levels deep. POST the chain of manager names to https://api.example.com/org-chain.

outcomeExpectations: The workflow walks the manager chain iteratively or recursively with a depth cap of 10 levels.

The agent did NOT nest one Loop Over Items node inside another in the same workflow — if looping is needed, the inner iteration uses a sub-workflow or sequential fetches with an explicit depth counter.
